title: Suspicious User Activity
story: DLP system flagged unusual access patterns from an internal service account.
The account 'dbadmin' was observed accessing systems and services outside its
normal operational profile during non-business hours.
Multiple services have logged activity from this account: SSH, MySQL, FTP.
Investigate the full scope of activity and determine if this is a compromise or

objectives.label: Identify the time of first anomalous activity (HH:MM)

hints: Look at events from user 'dbadmin' across all sourcetypes
Use: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case3_* | rex field=_raw "user=(?<user>\w+)|for (?<user2>\w+) from"
FTP transfers with large byte counts indicate potential data movement
Normal business hours for this environment: 08:00–18:00 UTC
splunk_queries: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case3_* dbadmin | sort _time | table _time, sourcetype, _raw
